'''Batcheela''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] from [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. She lived in [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]] with her husband, [[Warok/Legends|Warok]], and their children, [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] and [[Malani]].

{{Char-stub}}

*{{Ewoks|Malani the Warrior}} {{Mo}}
